description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a low stone wall and a well-maintained yard with shrubs, trees, and a small garden. The house features a prominent cross-gabled roof with brown shingles and white trim, giving it a classic suburban appearance. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns, a main entrance with decorative plants, and a large garage door. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, with flower boxes adding a touch of color. The backyard contains a blue trampoline and additional landscaping, while the driveway and front gate provide access from the street. The overall structure is compact, with a focus on residential comfort and curb appeal.
description: A single-story cross-gabled bungalow with a brown shingle roof, white trim, a covered porch, garage, and landscaped yard enclosed by a stone wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, garage door, and landscaped front yard with shrubs and a mailbox.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, blue trampoline, and the back side of the house with fewer windows and a simple garden.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the porch, symmetrical windows with flower boxes, and the blue trampoline in the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the back of the garage, garden beds, and the stone wall enclosing the property.
